title: lithocarpus rhioensis
intro: Lithocarpus rhioensis, also known as the Japanese stone pine, is a species of evergreen tree native to Japan, belonging to the beech family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, as well as its ability to lower cholesterol levels. The health benefits of Lithocarpus rhioensis include reducing the risk of heart disease, improving immune function, and supporting digestive health. Lithocarpus rhioensis can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or supplement, and is also used in traditional Japanese cooking, particularly in the form of its edible seeds.
